caption: A person's hands hold a sports trading card package against a background that includes a small inset video of a man with a beard wearing a dark blue shirt. The background features a desk with a "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the initial stages, the hands hold a white and yellow card encased in a protective sleeve. As the sequence progresses, the card is flipped over to reveal a detailed descriptive back. The card identifies the player as "TIM RAINES" and lists his position as "OUTFIELDER". A large block of text reads, "CONGRATULATIONS! You have You have just received a One-of-One 1989 Topps Big Baseball Framed Autograph Card from 2021 Topps Transcendent Collection - Hall of Fame Edition." Below this, a statistical table lists career data, including "LIFE" totals of "2502" games and a ".385" "SLG PCT." The "Topps" logo is visible in the upper left of the card's reverse side.
